title: Anime mob girls
description:
Resource pack which changes many mobs to 
anime girls
body:
### [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) needed or [CIT-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)


This pack turns mobs into girls(only)

**Mobs list:** Allay, Bee, Cat, Cow, Creeper, Ender Dragon, Drowned, Enderman, Endermite, Evoker, Fox, Ghast, Husk, Illusioner, Iron Golem, Magma Cube, Phantom, Pig, Piglin, Piglin Brute, Pillager, Sheep, Shulker, Skeleton, Slime, Stray, Vex, Vindicator, Warden, Witch, Wither, Zombie, Zombified Piglin
